response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack engineering skills and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) work. While his experience aligns well with cloud and tooling aspects of the role, his AI/GenAI production experience is less explicitly detailed than required, and his leadership in technical discovery sessions is not clearly evidenced. His diverse background and open-source contributions suggest adaptability and depth, warranting an interview to explore fit further.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes).
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, aligning with key technologies in the role.
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical leadership in developer tooling and frameworks.
concerns: AI/GenAI production experience is not explicitly detailed beyond recent agentic workflows, falling short of the 8-year requirement.
Lack of clear evidence of leading technical discovery sessions or stakeholder engagement at scale.
No mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM performance metrics in the resume.

key_factors.factor: Alignment with key technologies (MCP, agentic workflows)
